creator: odhiambo@gmail.com
text:
I have a problem where logstash asks for a Kerberos authentication password when I try to start it. This is installed from sysutils/logstash8.

```
root@gw:/usr/local/etc/logstash # /usr/local/etc/rc.d/logstash start
Starting logstash.
logstash@MYDOMAIN.NAME's Password:
```

I have never used Kerberos for anything before.
Any advise on how to stop this from happening?
